nasb.text: The king is not saved by a mighty army; A warrior is not delivered by great strength.

esv.text: The king is not saved by his great army; a warrior is not delivered by his great strength.

cnv.text: 君王不是因兵多得勝， 勇士不是因力大得救。

ccb.text: 君王不能靠兵多取胜， 勇士不能凭力大获救。

csbs.text: 君王不能靠军队众多得拯救， 勇士不能靠力量强大得解救；
